product_overview: A web-based inventory management system for tracking products, stock movements, warehouses, suppliers, and user access. It provides operational workflows for stock receipts, issues, transfers, stock opname, returns, and reporting.
core_goals: Log in to the inventory system and access the dashboard
Manage master data such as products, categories, units, suppliers, warehouses, users, and roles
Record stock transactions including goods receipts, goods issues, stock transfers, stock opname, and returns
Review inventory reports such as stock card, stock mutation, inventory value, and minimum stock
Update personal account settings and system connectivity preferences

features.name: Login
features.description: Authenticates an admin user with email and password and redirects to the dashboard after success.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See the dashboard

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Shows inventory KPIs, stock activity chart, and low-stock items at a glance.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View KPI summary cards -> View stock activity chart -> View low-stock item list
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select a warehouse filter -> View updated KPI values -> Reset the warehouse filter -> See overall statistics again
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open the sidebar collapse control -> See the sidebar shrink or expand with animation

features.name: CRUD Data Barang
features.description: Allows users to create, view, edit, search, filter, and delete product SKU records.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Open add product form -> Fill in product details -> Upload product photo -> Save product -> See the new product in the table
Navigate to /products -> Search for a product -> Apply category or supplier filters -> See matching products only -> Reset filters -> See the full list again
Navigate to /products -> Open edit product form for an existing product -> Update product details -> Save changes -> See the updated row in the table
Navigate to /products -> Delete an existing product -> Confirm deletion -> See the product removed from the list

features.name: CRUD Kategori Barang
features.description: Lets users manage product categories through full create, edit, search, filter, and delete workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to /categories -> Open add category form -> Fill in category name and description -> Save category -> See the new category in the table
Navigate to /categories -> Search for a category -> Change status filter -> See the list update -> Reset status filter -> See the category again
Navigate to /categories -> Open edit form for an existing category -> Update the category name -> Save changes -> See the updated category row
Navigate to /categories -> Delete an existing category -> Confirm deletion -> See the category removed from the list

features.name: CRUD Satuan Barang
features.description: Lets users manage measurement units for inventory items.
user_flows: Navigate to /units -> Open add unit form -> Fill in unit name and symbol -> Save unit -> See the new unit in the table
Navigate to /units -> Search for a unit -> Change status filter -> See the list update -> Reset status filter -> See the unit again
Navigate to /units -> Open edit form for an existing unit -> Update the unit name -> Save changes -> See the updated unit row
Navigate to /units -> Delete an existing unit -> Confirm deletion -> See the unit removed from the list

features.name: CRUD Supplier
features.description: Supports maintaining supplier contact records used in stock receipt and return workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to /suppliers -> Open add supplier form -> Fill in supplier contact details -> Save supplier -> See the new supplier in the table
Navigate to /suppliers -> Search for a supplier -> Change status filter -> See the list update -> Reset status filter -> See the supplier again
Navigate to /suppliers -> Open edit form for an existing supplier -> Update supplier name -> Save changes -> See the updated supplier row
Navigate to /suppliers -> Delete an existing supplier -> Confirm deletion -> See the supplier removed from the list

features.name: CRUD Gudang/Lokasi
features.description: Manages warehouse and storage location records used throughout stock operations.
user_flows: Navigate to /warehouses -> Open add warehouse form -> Fill in warehouse details -> Save warehouse -> See the new warehouse in the table
Navigate to /warehouses -> Search for a warehouse -> Change status filter -> See the list update -> Reset status filter -> See the warehouse again
Navigate to /warehouses -> Open edit form for an existing warehouse -> Update warehouse name -> Save changes -> See the updated warehouse row
Navigate to /warehouses -> Delete an existing warehouse -> Confirm deletion -> See the warehouse removed from the list

features.name: CRUD Barang Masuk
features.description: Records incoming inventory receipts from suppliers into a selected warehouse.
user_flows: Navigate to /goods-receipts -> Open add transaction form -> Fill in transaction date, supplier, warehouse, and reference number -> Add product items -> Set quantities -> Save draft -> See the new transaction with Draft status
Navigate to /goods-receipts -> Open transaction details for a draft receipt -> View the item list and transaction information
Navigate to /goods-receipts -> Complete a draft receipt -> Confirm completion -> See the status change to Selesai
Navigate to /goods-receipts -> Delete a draft receipt -> Confirm deletion -> See the transaction removed from the table
Navigate to /goods-receipts -> Enter a transaction reference in search -> Apply search -> See only matching transactions

features.name: CRUD Barang Keluar
features.description: Records outgoing inventory from a warehouse to a recipient.
user_flows: Navigate to /goods-issues -> Open add transaction form -> Fill in transaction date, warehouse, and recipient -> Add product items -> Set quantities within available stock -> Save draft -> See the new transaction with Draft status
Navigate to /goods-issues -> Complete a draft issue -> Confirm completion -> See the status change to Selesai
Navigate to /goods-issues -> Try to enter quantity above available stock -> See a validation warning
Navigate to /goods-issues -> Delete a draft issue -> Confirm deletion -> See the transaction removed from the table

features.name: CRUD Transfer Stok
features.description: Moves stock between two different warehouses while enforcing transfer rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /stock-transfers -> Open add transfer form -> Select different source and destination warehouses -> Add product items -> Set quantities within available stock -> Save draft -> See the new transfer with Draft status
Navigate to /stock-transfers -> Try to select the same warehouse as both source and destination -> See a validation warning
Navigate to /stock-transfers -> Complete a draft transfer -> Confirm completion -> See the status change to Selesai
Navigate to /stock-transfers -> Delete a draft transfer -> Confirm deletion -> See the transfer removed from the table

features.name: CRUD Stock Opname
features.description: Supports physical stock audits with system quantity, physical quantity, and difference tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /stock-opnames -> Open add stock opname form -> Select a warehouse with stocked items -> Review auto-loaded item list -> Adjust physical quantities -> Save draft -> See the new opname with Draft status
Navigate to /stock-opnames -> Open opname details -> View the differences between system and physical quantities
Navigate to /stock-opnames -> Complete a draft opname -> Confirm completion -> See the status change to Selesai
Navigate to /stock-opnames -> Delete a draft opname -> Confirm deletion -> See the opname removed from the table

features.name: CRUD Retur Barang
features.description: Handles item returns in or out with transaction drafting, quantity entry, and completion.
user_flows: Navigate to /stock-returns -> Open add return form -> Choose return type and warehouse -> Add item rows -> Enter return quantities and reason -> Save draft -> See the new return with Draft status
Navigate to /stock-returns -> Select return out and enter quantity above available stock -> See a stock warning
Navigate to /stock-returns -> Complete a draft return -> Confirm completion -> See the status change to Selesai
Navigate to /stock-returns -> Delete a draft return -> Confirm deletion -> See the return removed from the table

features.name: Laporan Kartu Stok
features.description: Displays per-item stock history with product, warehouse, type, and date filters.
user_flows: Navigate to /stock-card -> Select a product -> Filter by date range -> View the stock card table for that item
Navigate to /stock-card -> Change the transaction type filter to Barang Masuk -> View only incoming stock rows
Navigate to /stock-card -> Reset filters -> See the full stock history again

features.name: Laporan Mutasi Barang
features.description: Summarizes all stock movements with filters and totals by product and warehouse.
user_flows: Navigate to /stock-mutations -> Select a warehouse -> View mutation rows for that warehouse only
Navigate to /stock-mutations -> Select a product -> View mutation rows for that product only
Navigate to /stock-mutations -> Review positive and negative net change indicators -> Export report data

features.name: Laporan Nilai Persediaan
features.description: Shows current inventory valuation with filters by product, warehouse, and category.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventory-value -> Search by product SKU -> View matching valuation rows
Navigate to /inventory-value -> Select a category -> See the table update to that category
Navigate to /inventory-value -> Select a warehouse -> See valuation data scoped to that warehouse
Navigate to /inventory-value -> Export report data

features.name: Laporan Stok Minimum
features.description: Lists items that are at or below minimum stock thresholds and supports severity-based filtering.
user_flows: Navigate to /minimum-stock -> Select severity as Kritis -> View only zero-stock items
Navigate to /minimum-stock -> Apply category and warehouse filters -> See the table narrow to matching items
Navigate to /minimum-stock -> Review stock status indicators and fulfillment progress bars -> Export report data

features.name: CRUD Manajemen User
features.description: Allows administrators to create, edit, search, and delete application users and assign roles and warehouse placement.
user_flows: Navigate to /users -> Open add user form -> Fill in user profile details -> Select role and warehouse -> Save user -> See the new user in the grid
Navigate to /users -> Enter mismatched password and confirmation -> See validation error
Navigate to /users -> Search for a user -> Open edit form -> Update the name -> Save changes -> See the updated user in the grid
Navigate to /users -> Delete an existing user -> Confirm deletion -> See the user removed from the list

features.name: CRUD Role dan Permission
features.description: Manages roles and permission assignments using a checkbox matrix.
user_flows: Navigate to /roles -> Open add role form -> Enter role name -> Select permissions in the matrix -> Save role -> See the new role card with assigned permissions
Navigate to /roles -> Open edit form for an existing custom role -> Add more permissions -> Save changes -> See the summary update on the role card
Navigate to /roles -> Review built-in roles -> Confirm delete controls are unavailable for protected roles
Navigate to /roles -> Delete a custom role -> Confirm deletion -> See the role removed from the list

features.name: Notifikasi Stok
features.description: Displays low-stock notifications and lets users mark them as read.
user_flows: Navigate to /stock-notifications -> View the list of low-stock notifications -> Mark a notification as read -> See the notification state update

features.name: Pengaturan Akun
features.description: Lets users update profile details, change passwords, configure security PIN settings, switch roles, and test system connectivity.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/user -> Update full name in the profile section -> Save the profile -> See the updated name reflected in the account settings
Navigate to /settings/user -> Enter current password, new password, and confirmation -> Toggle password visibility -> Submit the password change
Navigate to /settings/user -> Enter a 6-digit PIN and confirm it -> Save the PIN -> See the PIN settings accepted
Navigate to /settings/user -> Test database connectivity -> View a success message -> Test S3 connectivity -> View a success message
Navigate to /settings/user -> Select a role and enter the security PIN -> Switch role view -> See the active role mode banner -> Return to admin mode
